seo.title: Social Commerce Loop | Wink Academy
seo.metaDescription: Learn how hotel content, bookable links, storefronts, checkout, attribution, and guest relationship connect in a closed-loop booking path.

fields.heading: The social commerce loop.
fields.body: Learn how hotel content, bookable links, storefronts, checkout, attribution, and guest relationship connect in a closed-loop booking path.

fields.heading: Choose the next step that fits your role.
fields.body: Learn how hotel content, bookable links, storefronts, checkout, attribution, and guest relationship connect in a closed-loop booking path.

cards.title: 02 Attach the path
cards.body: Use a card, link, QR code, storefront, or Partner route that opens the same offer the guest saw in the content.

cards.title: 03 Close the loop
cards.body: Carry source attribution into Booking Engine or inquiry flow so the hotel can see which content or Partner created value.

items.question: What is hotel social commerce?
items.answer: It is the practice of turning social discovery into a measurable booking or inquiry path.

items.question: Who can use the loop?
items.answer: Hotels, Partners, agencies, event organizers, communities, and platform teams can use the loop when the offer and attribution are clear.

items.question: Where should I go next?
items.answer: Read the social post to confirmed booking guide or explore the Partners route.

fields.heading: Ready to make hotel demand bookable?
fields.body: Start with the route that matches your team, then move into a focused demo or sign-up flow.
